'''ganganga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecoureterocele|cecoureterocele]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecoureterocele|cecoureterocele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ganganga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gængængæth|gængængæth]] || [[word:gængængæj|gængængæj]] || [[word:gængængæsh|gængængæsh]] || [[word:gængængæ|gængængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangangangath|gangangangath]] || [[word:gangangangaj|gangangangaj]] || [[word:gangangangash|gangangangash]] || [[word:ganganganga|ganganganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangangath|gangangath]] || [[word:gangangaj|gangangaj]] || [[word:gangangash|gangangash]] || [[word:ganganga|ganganga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangafngath|gangafngath]] || [[word:gangafngaj|gangafngaj]] || [[word:gangafngash|gangafngash]] || [[word:gangafngaf|gangafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gangangatha|gangangatha]] || [[word:gangangaja|gangangaja]] || [[word:gangangasha|gangangasha]] || [[word:gangangaka|gangangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gangangath|gangangath]] || [[word:gangangaj|gangangaj]] || [[word:gangangash|gangangash]] || [[word:ganganga|ganganga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gangangathal|gangangathal]] || [[word:gangangajal|gangangajal]] || [[word:gangangashal|gangangashal]] || [[word:gangangakal|gangangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gangangathatha|gangangathatha]] || [[word:gangangajaja|gangangajaja]] || [[word:gangangashasha|gangangashasha]] || [[word:gangangaka|gangangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gangangathan|gangangathan]] || [[word:gangangajan|gangangajan]] || [[word:gangangashan|gangangashan]] || [[word:gangangakan|gangangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gangangathaoro|gangangathaoro]] || [[word:gangangajaoro|gangangajaoro]] || [[word:gangangashaoro|gangangashaoro]] || [[word:gangangakaoro|gangangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
